title: 1910s
content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Closeuptarkin.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Peter Cushing]] was born in 1913]]

A list of events in the '''1910s''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==Births==
===1911===
*[[January 31]] – [[Eddie Byrne]].
*[[August 3]] – [[Alex McCrindle]].
*? – [[Ronnie Phillips]].

===1912===
*[[April 27]] – [[Francis Batsoni]].

===1913===
*[[May 26]] – [[Peter Cushing]].

===1914===
*[[April 2]] – [[Alec Guinness]].
*[[April 12]] – [[Gilbert Taylor]].
*[[September 5]] – [[Stuart Freeborn]].

===1915===
*[[February 11]] – [[Pat Welsh]].
*[[August 20]] – [[George Roussos]].
*[[December 7]] – [[Leigh Brackett]].

===1916===
*[[March 31]] – [[Lucille Bliss]].
*[[April 30]] – [[Phil Brown]].
*[[December 20]] – [[Tom Chantrell]].

===1918===
*[[November 4]] – [[Art Carney]].
*[[November 29]] – [[Reginald Thomason]].
*? – [[Rose Gilbert]].

===1919===
*? – [[Gilda Cohen]].
